context: Tests whether the agent catches stale or invented MetricKit signpost and extended launch APIs.

checklist.name: Rejects fake signpost helper
checklist.description: States that MXSignpostIntervalData.makeSignpostID(log:) is not the documented MetricKit API and removes that pattern.

checklist.name: Uses basic mxSignpost defaults
checklist.description: Uses MXMetricManager.makeLogHandle(category:) with mxSignpost(.begin/.end, log:name:) and leaves advanced dso, signpostID, and format parameters at defaults for the basic pattern.

checklist.name: Names signpost payload surface
checklist.description: States that custom MetricKit signpost metrics appear under MXMetricPayload.signpostMetrics.

checklist.name: Correct extended launch methods
checklist.description: Uses throwing type methods try MXMetricManager.extendLaunchMeasurement(forTaskID:) and try or try? MXMetricManager.finishExtendedLaunchMeasurement(forTaskID:), not shared instance methods.

checklist.name: Launch measurement constraints
checklist.description: Mentions Apple's operational constraints for extended launch measurement, such as main-thread calls, early state-restoration or first-scene-active timing, overlapping task windows, max 16 tasks, and finishing every started task.
